duration:
1-2 classes: 1.5 hours                                  
3-4 classes: 3.5 hours (includes time for lunch and self-guided teacher activity)
description: Hike along Martinez Regional Shoreline to learn about our important marsh habitats in the San Francisco Bay area. We will explore the plants and animals of this diverse community.
